who: legal ops teams in law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month
offer: For legal ops teams in law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month, inefficient contract management causes missed renewals. We automate renewal notifications instead of manual tracking of contract dates and compliance requirements.
problem: inefficient contract management leading to missed renewals
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for legal ops teams
Indie Hackers posts on contract management workflows
DM outreach to legal ops teams with demo video
Community forums for sharing legal tools and resources
try_it: Let users try storing agreement details and renewal notifications
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Short demo video of the manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from potential users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing contract data
